semantic.role: Infrastructure repository (DAO) for recording and querying LLM token usage logs in the SQLite database.
responsibilities: Records token usage entries for each sync session with metadata (sync ID, date, mode, tokens).
Retrieves aggregated daily usage summaries grouped by sync mode, returning the last 30 days.
Provides total aggregated usage statistics across all sessions (sum of input/output/total tokens and session count).
outOfScope: Any non-usage-related database operations (e.g., file tracking, symbol storage).
High-level business logic or orchestration of sync workflows.
invariants: Every usage record is inserted with a unique sync ID (process-pid-timestamp) and the current date.
Usage summaries always group by date and sync_mode, ordered by date descending, limited to 30 rows.
Total usage query is a global aggregation across all rows in the usage_logs table.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a stable SQLite-backed persistence layer for tracking LLM usage, supporting per-mode daily summaries and total aggregation.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: ArchSpine v1.0.0 — Architectural Governance & Semantic Layer for the AI Era: this file implements the foundational usage-tracking repository required for governance cost monitoring.

publicSurface.description: Inserts a usage log row with the given mode, token counts, and a generated sync ID. Called by sync orchestration services to record every LLM interaction.
Returns an array of daily usage summaries (input/output/total tokens) grouped by sync mode, limited to the last 30 days. Used by reporting views and dashboards.
Returns total aggregated input/output/total tokens and session count across all recorded usage. Used by billing or overview modules.

English.role: Infrastructure repository (DAO) for recording and querying LLM token usage logs in the SQLite database.
responsibilities: Records token usage entries for each sync session with metadata (sync ID, date, mode, tokens).
Retrieves aggregated daily usage summaries grouped by sync mode, returning the last 30 days.
Provides total aggregated usage statistics across all sessions (sum of input/output/total tokens and session count).
outOfScope: Any non-usage-related database operations (e.g., file tracking, symbol storage).
High-level business logic or orchestration of sync workflows.

exports.name: recordUsage
exports.signature:
recordUsage(
  db: Database.Database,
  mode: string,
  input: number,
  output: number,
  total: number,
)
